entry.title: [MK] Sadie Sink As Jean Grey?! Marvel’s BIGGEST Secret Wars Rumor Yet | Movie Knights Roundtable
entry.summary:
Sadie Sink reportedly joining Avengers: Secret Wars sparks massive MCU fan chaos — with rumors pointing to Jean Grey and an explosive Spider-Man crossover setup. This could change EVERYTHING.
Sadie Sink reportedly joining Avengers: Secret Wars is the biggest MCU casting shock of the year — and new reports suggest she may debut in the next Spider-Man movie before appearing in Secret Wars. While fans are speculating she could be Jean Grey, nothing is confirmed yet… but the rumors are WILD.

entry.title: [MK] V for Vendetta Returns — HBO Is Taking a Huge Swing | Movie Knights Roundtable
entry.summary:
A V for Vendetta TV series is officially in development at HBO — and this might be one of the biggest, riskiest comic adaptations in years. Will it modernize the political message? Stick to the graphic novel? Or reinvent the world entirely? We’re breaking down everything we know so far.
Plus: the first trailer for Super Mario Galaxy, Christopher Nolan’s Odyssey teases massive scale, Sabrina Carpenter leads a new Alice in Wonderland musical, Disney pushes into AI-generated content, and a Jimmy Olsen spinoff enters development at DC.
🎬 Welcome to the Movie Knights Roundtable Here’s what we’re talking about this week: HBO developing a V for Vendetta TV series Super Mario Galaxy movie trailer breakdown Christopher Nolan’s Odyssey — first look and scope Sabrina Carpenter's Alice in Wonderland musical adaptation Werewolf By Night follow-up confirmed Disney exploring AI for Disney+ features Jimmy Olsen spinoff series announced Alien: Earth renewed, and more!

entry.summary:
Our affiliate NordVPN link: https://nordvpn.com/MovieKnights
